description_long: This object is a handheld game controller, featuring an ergonomic, contoured body designed to fit comfortably in both hands. The surface is predominantly matte black with a slightly glossy finish on the buttons and thumbsticks. The top face includes two analog thumbsticks, a directional pad, and several round buttons, all arranged for easy thumb access. The front edge displays a label with the text 'VEX', suggesting a possible brand or model. The rear side has visible trigger buttons and ports, likely for charging or connectivity. The overall design is compact and robust, suitable for interactive electronic entertainment in urban environments.
description: A black ergonomic handheld game controller with dual thumbsticks, multiple buttons, and a 'VEX' label on the front.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the main button layout, thumbsticks, and the 'VEX' label.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the contoured grips and the profile of the thumbsticks and buttons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the trigger buttons, connectivity ports, and the back of the controller.
description_view_3: Side-rear view emphasizing the ergonomic grip and the arrangement of the buttons and thumbsticks.
